acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Result fixture covers node_id, branch, Linux and macOS commits, start/end timestamps, pass/fail state, metrics, artifacts, and notes.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: crates/protocol/fixtures/m3-cross-device-video-smoke/result.json includes all required fields and is covered by protocol tests.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Latency metrics are nullable when not measured.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The fixture stores median_glass_to_glass_ms and p95_glass_to_glass_ms as null, and tests assert the None values.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Validation rejects invented decode, render, presentation, or latency values without matching evidence.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: crates/protocol/src/cross_device.rs tests reject decode, render, presentation, and latency metrics without matching artifact roles.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Tests or command evidence prove the fixture validates successfully.
No live cross-device behavior claim is made.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: Fixture notes and docs state this is schema-only and claims no live decode, render, presentation, or latency behavior.

realWorldValidation.evidence: This node validates a result schema fixture only; live cross-device behavior remains in m3-cross-device-video-smoke.
